A '''Mon Calamari Jedi Knight''' served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during their last decades.

==Biography==
A [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], serving the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. They built a green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and at some point passed his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]], attaining the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="Hnn53" />

The Jedi was active during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], a growing division between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. When Emissary [[Nathanjo Nirrelz]], a Gotal representative, was [[Gotal hostage standoff|taken hostage]] by the Separatist group [[Roshu Sune/Legends|Roshu Sune]] during the [[Battle of Antar 4 (Separatist Crisis)|battle]] of [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]], the Jedi Order was asked to intervene. The Mon Calamari was dispatched as part of a six-member Jedi task force to the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] colony world [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]], under the leadership of fellow Jedi Knight, [[Sarrissa Jeng/Legends|Sarrissa Jeng]]. Once there, the team of [[Jedi Diplomat|diplomats]] were to negotiate the release of Nirrelz. During the negotiations, a group of unaffiliated vigilantes opened fire on the Roshu Shone guerrillas. This attack panicked the Gotal separatists, who opened fire on their captives. Leaping to defend the unarmed hostages, the Mon Calamari and his fellow Jedi managed to subdue the guerrillas on their [[Passenger liner/Legends|commuter hopper]], but not before [[Kaloor Cofi]] and [[Antyard-Wo Shissan]] lost their lives. Emerging from the firefight, the Mon Calamari and Jeng escorted Emissary Nirrelz to safety while the other Jedi helped transport the surviving hostages to [[Medcenter/Legends|medcenters]] in the nearby cities of [[Skreeka]] and [[Talos]].<ref name="Hnn53" />

After the fighting ended, the surviving Jedi departed for the [[Jedi chapter house (Aleen Minor)|Order's chapter house]] on [[Aleen/Legends|Aleen]] for the [[Jedi funeral/Legends|funerals]] of Cofi and Shissan. Meanwhile, across the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] network, the Jedi were heavily criticized by [[Gotal Foreign Affairs Commune]] leader [[Shagrad Loset]] for what he saw as meddling in an internal affair. Rebuffing this criticism of the Order, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and High Council member [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] commended the Jedi effort on Atzerri.<ref name="Hnn53" />

==Behind the scenes==
This Jedi was the creation of artist [[Joe Corroney]]. The Jedi was given the name Kerrshnek on Joe Corroney's website.<ref name="JCWeb">{{WebCite|url=http://www.joecorroney.com/comics101/content/2003/20030612.html|text=Star Wars Insider, HoloNet News and Expanded Universe Jedi Questions|archivedate=20250404203017}}</ref>
